nasb.text: And I discovered more bitter than death the woman whose heart is snares and nets, whose hands are chains. One who is pleasing to God will escape from her, but the sinner will be captured by her.

esv.text: And I find something more bitter than death: the woman whose heart is snares and nets, and whose hands are fetters. He who pleases God escapes her, but the sinner is taken by her.

cnv.text: 我發現一個比死亡更惡毒的婦人，她有如羅網，心如陷阱，手如鎖鍊。蒙　神喜悅的人得以擺脫她，罪人卻被她纏住。

ccb.text: 我发现有的妇人比死亡更苦毒，她是个陷阱，心如网罗，手像锁链。敬畏上帝的人避开她，罪人却被她俘虏。

csbs.text: 我发现一种女人，比死亡还苦毒：她的心是圈套和网罗，她的手是镣铐。蒙神喜悦的人必能逃离她；但罪人必被她缠住。
